examples: Special solvents can be used to decarbonize and desulfurize waste catalysts to replace the high-temperature roasting pretreatment process.
Through using spraying magnesium grain into iron to desulfurize and pushing out the top slag, the sulfur content in the iron was decreased.
A management act for dedust and desulfurize of dry-damp two-step combined method was brought forward when the efficiency of smoke dedust and desulfurize were 98% and 80%.
